headline: 6 Stocks That Can Benefit From the Massive Amount of Water That AI Data Centers Need
summary: Water, water everywhere, but…is too much going to artificial-intelligence data centers?  With expected earnings growth and its recent valuation, shares could fetch about $470 in a year, up 19% from recent levels.

headline: EATON CORP PLC (NYSE:ETN) Embodies the GARP Strategy with Strong Growth and Sound Fundamentals
